ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spare_parts" (
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spare part */,
  "spare_part_name" TEXT /* Name of the spare part */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the spare part */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Duration of warranty coverage */,
  "warranty_type" TEXT /* Type of warranty coverage */,
  "labour_charges" REAL /* Labour charges for repair services */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for procurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spare_part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spare_part_products" (
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spare part */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Compatibility notes for the spare part and product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spare_part_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spare part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the spare part ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_spare_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("spare_part_id") REFERENCES spare_parts ("spare_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spare part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the spare part in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the spare part */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_spare_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("spare_part_id") REFERENCES spare_parts ("spare_part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the claim */,
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spare part */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_spare_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("spare_part_id") REFERENCES spare_parts ("spare_part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each spare part
Compatibility notes for the spare part and product
ID of the customer who placed the order
Unique identifier for each order item
Quantity of the spare part ordered
Unit price of the spare part
Unique identifier for each inventory item
Current quantity of the spare part in stock
Reorder level for the spare part
Warehouse location of the spare part
Unique identifier for each warranty claim
ID of the customer who made the claim
